⌕
Player Profile & Percentile Rankings
Search for any NCAA player to see their season stats and percentile rankings compared to all qualified players at the same position. A percentile of 85 means the player ranks better than 85% of peers.

Qualification: Players need ≥ 10 games played and ≥ 12 minutes per game to receive percentile rankings.

Position groups: Guards are only compared to guards, Wings to Wings, Forwards to Forwards, Bigs to Bigs.

Radar chart: Each axis = percentile rank (0–100). Outer ring = 100th percentile. Gold ring = 50th percentile (average).

Season: Currently showing 2025–26 data. 2024–25 historical data coming soon.

🏀

Search for a Player

Type a player name to load their profile and percentile rankings.
